directory.name: MCPList
directory.description: A curated directory of MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and other MCP clients. Features search, voting, reviews, and detailed server pages with GitHub stats.
directory.type: Community-driven MCP server directory with voting and review system

submission_method: GitHub Issue (via web form) or direct PR to data/servers.json

submission_guidelines.summary: Submit via the web form at https://mcplist.site/submit which creates a GitHub issue, or submit a PR editing data/servers.json directly.
steps_via_web_form: Fill in the GitHub Repository URL (required)
Select a Category from the dropdown (required)
Add comma-separated use cases for 'Best For' (optional)
Check if it's an official Anthropic/MCP server (optional)
Click 'Create GitHub Issue to Submit' - opens a pre-filled GitHub issue
steps_via_github_pr: Edit data/servers.json to add the new server entry

web_form_fields.placeholder: A brief description of what the server does...
web_form_fields.label: Description

web_form_fields.placeholder: e.g., reading files, writing code, local development
web_form_fields.label: Best For (comma-separated use cases)
This is an official Anthropic/MCP server

submission_guidelines.review_process: Submissions are reviewed manually via GitHub issues. Approved servers are typically added within 24-48 hours.
data_sources: GitHub Awesome Lists (punkpeye, wong2, appcypher, TensorBlock, habitoai, jaw9c, rohitg00)
Third-Party Directories (mcp.so, PulseMCP, mcpservers.org, AI Agents List, Portkey, MCP Server Finder)
